name: disco_party
description: High-energy electronic dance music with disco vibes. Heavy bass, synth leads, four-on-the-floor beat. Perfect for dance sequences and party scenes.
trigger_hints: Play during dance sequences, party scenes, or high-energy character moments. Sync with bpm=128 animations.

sources.title: Electronic Dance Music Background Music
sources.author: Music_Unlimited
sources.notes: Electronic dance track with strong beat. Duration ~2:38. Good for disco/worm dance scenes.

mixing_notes.ducking: reduce by 2-3 dB during dialogue, but keep prominent for dance
